characters.name: Sherlock Holmes
characters.description: The famous consulting detective of Baker Street, brilliant and deductive.

characters.name: Dr. Watson
characters.description: Holmes's friend, flatmate, and narrator; a physician and former army doctor.

characters.name: Dr. James Mortimer
characters.description: A country physician from Dartmoor who brings the Baskerville case to Holmes, carrying the manuscript of the Baskerville legend.

characters.name: Sir Charles Baskerville
characters.description: Recently deceased baronet found dead on the grounds of Baskerville Hall under mysterious circumstances.

characters.name: Sir Henry Baskerville
characters.description: Nephew and heir to Sir Charles, arriving from Canada to claim the Baskerville estate.

settings.name: 221B Baker Street
settings.description: Holmes and Watson's famous London lodgings where they receive Dr. Mortimer.

settings.name: Dartmoor / Baskerville Hall
settings.description: Remote moorland estate in Devon, described as gloomy and forbidding, setting of the Baskerville curse.

plot_threads.thread: The mysterious death of Sir Charles Baskerville — natural causes or supernatural
Protecting Sir Henry Baskerville, the new heir, from the supposed Baskerville curse
The legend of the supernatural hound versus a rational explanation

world_rules: Holmes's deductive method: observation of small details reveals large truths
The Baskerville curse — legend of a demonic hound that haunts the family line
